{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the optimization problem\n\\[\n\\begin{array}{ll}\n\\text{minimize} & x^2 \\\\\n\\text{subject to} & c(x)=0,\n\\end{array}\n\\]\nwhere \(x\\in \\mathbf{R}\) and\n\\[\nc(x)=\n\\begin{cases}\nx^6\\sin(1/x), & x\\neq 0,\\\\\n0, & x=0.\n\\end{cases}\n\\]\nVerify that \(x=0\) is a global solution and a strict local solution, but not an isolated local solution."}
